BCCI Scheduling Blunder Leads to Lucknow T20I Washout

BCCI Scheduling Blunder Leads to Lucknow T20I Washout

The India vs South Africa T20I in Lucknow was abandoned without a ball bowled due to hazardous air quality, raising serious questions over BCCI scheduling decisions. Experts and fans criticized the board for ignoring seasonal pollution and weather risks that made the washout predictable.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here:
👉 5 Shocking Reasons BCCI Scheduling Failed as Lucknow T20I Was Abandoned
